comments.comment: This really cleared things up for me, thanks!
Great explanation, but could you add more examples?
Callback hell is the worst. Promises saved my life.
I prefer Svelte over both of them.
Flexbox is still better for 1D layouts though.
Thanks for the tips on clustering!
WebAssembly is going to be huge.
Sometimes denormalization is needed for read performance.
HATEOAS is too complex for simple APIs.
Types saved me so many runtime errors.
Docker compose makes local dev so easy.
Semantic HTML is the first step.
Context API is enough for small apps.
